name: File Uploads with UploadThing
description: Add file uploads to a Next.js app using UploadThing. Includes file type validation, size limits, upload progress UI, server-side processing callback, and CDN-delivered URLs. No S3 configuration needed.

steps.description: Create file router with routes (imageUploader, documentUploader), auth check, file type/size rules, onUploadComplete callback
Create Next.js route handler from your file router
Export typed client components: UploadButton, UploadDropzone, Uploader
Create file upload component with drag-and-drop, progress bar, and preview
Add UPLOADTHING_SECRET and UPLOADTHING_APP_ID from UploadThing dashboard
